title: Tide-Pool Transect: Maximizing Spawning-Node Richness
strategies: arithmetic-progression baseline (evenly spaced pools, R=1 -> Ratio 0.1)
short low-restart simulated-annealing over pool sets (weak more-sums layout, R~1.01-1.05)
multi-restart simulated annealing from random seeds maximizing |A+A|/|A-A| (R~1.02-1.06)
